name: Cal-Med

fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Micro NEMT/wheelchair transport with ~4 employees and ~$289K est. revenue. No identified school district contracts. Sub-scale and off-thesis for Summit tuck-in.

name: Pacificoach

name: Holiday Limousine Charlotte

fit_notes: Limousine/livery service, not a school-bus operator. Address (108 N Graham St, downtown Charlotte) is consistent with event/livery business. No CMS district contracts identified. Off-thesis for Summit.

name: Total Access Assisted

fit_notes: Micro NEMT/wheelchair operator with no website and no confirmed district contracts. Sub-scale; off-thesis for Summit tuck-in.

name: JPD Inc Wheelchair Transport
recent_news: Listed among top wheelchair transportation providers in Spokane area; estimated $500K-$1M revenue per third-party listings.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator; owner-operated NEMT/wheelchair transport in Spokane Valley. Owner-led small business with potential succession signal but off-thesis (no district contracts, no yellow buses). Skip for Summit tuck-in unless paired with broader SPED roll-up.
